welcome_first_time: 🚕 Welcome to RideShare Bot! Your Telegram-powered ride-hailing assistant. 🚗 For Drivers: Register, go online, and earn by completing rides. 👤 For Riders: Request rides, track your driver, and rate your experience. 👋 Hi {name}! Please select your language first:
welcome_returning: 👋 Welcome back, {name}! What would you like to do today?
welcome_rider:
👋 Welcome, {name}!

Ready to request a ride? Tap the button below!
about_rideshare: ℹ️ About RideShare Bot RideShare Bot is a Telegram-first ride-hailing system. ✅ No app download needed ✅ Quick ride booking via chat ✅ Real-time driver matching ✅ Multi-language support ✅ Secure ride tracking
help_general: 📚 RideShare Bot Help 🚕 Getting Started Tap "👤 Request a Ride" to book as a rider. Tap "🚗 I'm a Driver" to register and start earning. 🌐 Language Tap "🌐 Language" to switch between English, Amharic, or Afan Oromo. ❓ Need more help? Contact our support team.
help_rider: 👤 Rider Help 1️⃣ Tap "🚕 Request Ride" 2️⃣ Share your pickup location 3️⃣ Wait for driver match 4️⃣ Track your ride status 5️⃣ Rate your driver after completion ❌ Cancel: Use /cancel anytime to exit 📍 Status: Check ride status with the button
help_driver: 🚗 Driver Help 1️⃣ Register with your name, phone, vehicle & location 2️⃣ Go online with "✅ Go Available" 3️⃣ Accept incoming ride requests 4️⃣ Navigate to pickup & start the ride 5️⃣ Complete the ride when done 📊 Stats: View your earnings & performance ❌ Offline: Go offline when you're done
help_admin: 🛠 Admin Help 👥 View all registered drivers 🚕 Monitor active rides 📊 View platform statistics 📋 View ride history ❌ View cancelled rides 🔍 Search users by ID
profile_not_found: ❌ No profile found. Please register first using the main menu.
searching_animation_3: 🔍 Selecting the best match for you...
no_drivers: 😔 No Drivers Available Sorry, there are no drivers nearby at the moment. Please try again later!
ride_accepted: ✅ Ride Accepted! Ride is now in progress.
cancel_prompt: ⚠️ Cancel Active Ride? Are you sure you want to cancel? Frequent cancellations may affect your account.
cancel_confirmed: ✅ Operation cancelled. Returning to main menu.
cancel_no_active: ℹ️ No active operation to cancel. Returning to main menu.
error_already_active_ride: ⚠️ Active Ride Found You already have an active ride (ID: #{ride_id}). Please complete or cancel it first.
error_not_registered: ⚠️ You need to register first. Use the main menu to get started.
error_location_required: 📍 Location Required Please use the "📍 Share My Location" button below to share your GPS location. 💡 Tip: Make sure location services are enabled on your device.
error_ride_not_found: ❌ Ride not found or no longer available.
error_generic: ❌ Something went wrong. Please try again or use /start to return to the main menu.
registration_complete: ✅ Registration Complete! You're all set! Go online to start receiving ride requests.
select_location: 📍 Where should we pick you up? Tap the button below to share your current GPS location.
driver_registration_prompt: 🚗 Driver Registration Let's get you set up! Please enter your full name:
driver_phone_prompt: 📱 Phone Number Please enter your phone number: Examples: +251912345678 or 0912345678
share_location_prompt: 📍 Where are you based? Share your location to receive rides nearby.
admin_no_rides: 📋 No rides found in this category.
confirm_go_offline: ⚠️ Are you sure you want to go offline? You won't receive new ride requests.
plate_prompt: 🚗 Vehicle Plate Number Please enter your vehicle's plate number (e.g., A12345):
license_prompt: 📸 Driver's License Please upload a clear photo of your driver's license for verification.
pending_review: ⏳ Application Under Review Thank you for submitting your details. Your application is currently pending review by our team. You will be notified once approved.
approved_msg: 🎉 Application Approved! Congratulations! Your driver account has been approved. You can now go Available and start accepting rides.
rejected_msg: ❌ Application Rejected Unfortunately, your application was not approved at this time. Please contact support for more details.
driver_pending_error: ⚠️ Action Not Allowed Your account is currently under review or suspended. You cannot go online until approved.
driver_suspended_msg: 🚫 Account Suspended Your driver account has been suspended.
save_location_prompt: 💾 Save Location Please enter a name for this location (e.g., Home, Work):
